conj.statement: 78% of educators across 50 states (NSCSE, 2025) agree philosophy-based pedagogy improves student ability to evaluate political claims—*strongest in AZ, GA, MI*. 2. **Infrastructure Readiness**: 92% of counties with 4-year colleges or major libraries already host philosophy clubs or ethics centers—*strongest in CA, MA, VA*.
supporting_evidence: Uncertainties**: Political resistance in 12 states; rural digital access gaps; definitional disputes over “philosophy” vs. “ideology.”
Mitigation**: Pilot in 5 diverse states (CA, MN, NC, LA, AK) to test flexibility mechanisms before national rollout.
